name: Order Cancel Reject <9> message – FIX 4.4 – FIX Dictionary - OnixS
snippet: The Order Cancel Reject <9> message is issued by the broker upon receipt of a cancel request or cancel/replace request message which cannot be honored.

name: Don't Know Trade (Q) Message - TT Help Library
snippet: Purpose. Used to provide details of an execution reject. Note: This message will only be supported in a future release of the TT Inbound Drop Copy service.

name: OrderCancelReject - FIXimate

name: Don't Know Trade <Q> message – FIX 4.2 – FIX Dictionary - OnixS
snippet: The Don't Know Trade <Q> (DK) message notifies a trading partner that an electronically received execution has been rejected.
